Those that resemble banners, fishes, mountains, elephants,
lotuses, the Moon, horses, molten silver, swans, Bilva tree, diamond
(or Indra's weapon), conch and the Svastika design, lead to pros-
perity and abundance of food grains.

If they fall in clusters from the middle of the sky, they portend
the destruction of the king and the country. If it circles round and
round at the zenith of the sky, it indicates unrest and distress among
the people,

If it touches or comes away from the Sun or the Moon and
is accompanied by an earthquake, it will lead to an enemy attack,
danger to the ruler, famine and trouble from drought.
